programme.title: The Titan Games S1
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.desc: When Grug won't let her join his winning team, Eep forms her own underdog team in the first-ever sports competition – Ahhh! Valley's annual Egg Toss.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Thunk is so stinky he kills animals with his stench, he pretends to be a great hunter; A spider ant bite gives Grug the biggest brain in town.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: After pushing a broom for centuries, Merlin's apprentice, Douxie, springs into action when the great sorcerer asks him to find the Guardians of Arcadia.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Douxie, Claire, Steve and Jim meet the legendary King Arthur and his sister, Morgana, in medieval Camelot — where being a troll is punishable by death.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: After fruitless searching the universe for Shiro, the Paladins struggle to accept that they must find a new pilot to join the team

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Thunk invents ventriloquism when he tries (and fails) at stand-up comedy, but he gets jealous when Ahhh! Valley thinks the puppet is the real comedian/Eep is determined for two buffalippos to find love when Grug denies her dating privileges.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep takes up death-guarding at the watering hole, but finds out it's more mundane than she thought. Grug and Sandy get competitive when town members encroach on their treasure hunting/Gran convinces Grug that she controls the weather, but the power goes to her head when all of Ahhh! Valley believes her. Thunk tries to overcome his fear of thunderstorms.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When Miradero's Christmas presents are delayed and snow isn't falling, Lucky and her friends decide it's up to them to bring the Christmas spirit to Miradero.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When a sudden blizzard hits Miradero, Lucky and Maricela must work together to save the town.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Dozer and the crew must find a way to outsmart a clever bully named Blayde, a new ememy who kidnapped George and destroyed the Dozeratop mounds

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Merry Scary Christmas It's Christmas and Casper wants to spend the holiday with his human pal, Jimmy. Time Waits for No Ghost When Casper discovers a clock that can stop time, everyone wants to use it for his or her own purpose.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Ghostbust a Move When Jimmy's dad decides to move the family away from Deedstown, Casper and his friends vow to stop Mr. Bradley from selling their house. My Fair Harpy The Winter Chill Dance is coming up and Ra is determined to be king.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: When Ping Pong uses her magic to turn Rupert's pedal car into a spaceship they fly to the moon. There they meet the Man on the Moon who runs a cheese stall.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: It's the day of the Nutwood Egg and Spoon race but Raggety has magically turned Ping Pong into a giant egg. How can Ruprt and the friends have their race now?

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Rumors of scary sea monsters in the East End take the kids on a journey of discovering you shouldn’t believe everything you hear. / Mysterious globs disturbing the ocean turn out to be the byproduct of food from Unicorn Land.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells a tale about unicorns sailing in ships on clouds in search of Unicorn Land.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes two little containers of popcorn and two movie tickets, it’s movie night in the dollhouse! Demanding Director CatRat leads the Gabby Cats through a Gabby-fied version of a classic story, Gabby-locks and the Three Bears.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Pete the Polar Bear shows up for a vacation on MerCat’s sunny beach. Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats show Pete he can have a great vacation, even if things don’t go precisely to plan.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Gloria becomes determined to earn her Queen of Kindness Kidizen badge and welcomes some free-spirited rats who need a place to stay into the habitat. Despite her discomfort, Gloria encourages the rats to make themselves at home. When the rats play with her special baby tusk at the bottom of her tank, she finally snaps and sends the rats home. It isn't until the gang winds up at the rats' nest and Gloria almost takes a slice of the rats special cheese that she learns it's okay to say no.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Alex realizes he’s too small to climb onto his new habitat “stage”, he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a big, new roller coaster at Coney Island and figures if he can ride the big coaster, that’ll prove that he’s a BIG deal! But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Rodney heads to the Community Center for Junior Security Cadet picture day, TZG secretly helps him stay neat and clean for the photo shoot. / When Luis worries about his first ever math test, TZG secretly helps steady his nerves.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: New girl in town Felicia shows off her robo-dog but it runs out of control, and TZG must secretly stop the barking bot from wreaking havoc. / When Lula starts gathering birthday wishes from folks around town, TZG secretly keeps her surprise party under wraps.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (Specials) (S9)
programme.desc: Shawn's legal woes could end his season before it begins. Kris receives a once in a lifetime deal. Vernon upgrades the Gold Ship. Emily calls on her ace in the hole.

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: Tensions erupt among the crews as miners battle to bring in big gold. From fistfights to meltdowns, these are the loudest moments when they clashed.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Parker fights to stop his gold slide, Rick makes a discovery that could end his Vegas Valley dreams, and Kevin scores big at Sphinx Cut.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Ant finds a 1929 Austin 7, but it has brake issues, poor lights, and a surprise fault. Plus, the deadline to finish the house restoration looms.

programme.title: Ed Stafford's Rite Of Passage (S1)
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Ed must wrestle the giant heirs of Genghis Khan to become a man. He takes part in the annual rite of passage festival, Naadam.

programme.title: General History Of China (S1)
programme.desc: "Silk Road" refers to the ancient overland commercial trade route that started in ancient China and connected Asia, Africa and Europe.

programme.title: Ed Stafford's Rite Of Passage (S1)
programme.desc: Ed endures the bullet-ant ceremony, the most painful thing this side of child birth. Also facing 24 hours of agony are Brazilian boys who do this 20 times to become men.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Parker fights to stop his gold slide, Rick makes a discovery that could end his Vegas Valley dreams, and Kevin scores big at Sphinx Cut.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S2)
programme.desc: A seven-acre, snow-covered hoard pushes Matt to the brink. To clear the stairs, they toss 500 pounds of trash and hunt for lost gold on the top floor.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: In Florida, dark tiger pythons were introduced from Asia as pets and now pose a threat to the ecosystem. Otto and Pascal track them down.

programme.title: Expedition X (S6)
programme.desc: Joined by Jack Osbourne, Heather investigates the eerie ghost town of Vulture City, where Gold Rush-era spirits hint at a far older evil.

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: Tensions erupt among the crews as miners battle to bring in big gold. From fistfights to meltdowns, these are the loudest moments when they clashed.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Parker fights to stop his gold slide, Rick makes a discovery that could end his Vegas Valley dreams, and Kevin scores big at Sphinx Cut.

programme.title: The Many Lives Of Benjaman Kyle (S1)
programme.desc: Hot Snakes Media uncovers Benjaman Kyle's disturbing secrets, dark-web activity, erased files, and ties to the Burger Chef killings.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures (S13)
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate a demonic possession and its impact on an Erie, CO, family.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective (S4)
programme.desc: As small-town secrets unravel, Sheriff Mike Gormley uncovers a dangerous love triangle and a vengeful killer who is willing to risk his own blood for retribution.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Ant finds a 1929 Austin 7, but it has brake issues, poor lights, and a surprise fault. Plus, the deadline to finish the house restoration looms.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers (S18)
programme.desc: Car dealer Mike Brewer is back in the UK! Along with ace mechanic Marc ‘Elvis’ Priestley, he’s on a mission to find and restore iconic cars to sell for a profit.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S8)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it’s the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Air Jaws: Top Guns

programme.title: Dual Survival (S4)

programme.title: Shark Week: Belly Of The Beast: Feeding Frenzy (S1)
programme.desc: Researchers brave a great white shark feeding frenzy inside a life-sized whale decoy - which could be the key to finding the biggest great white sharks.

programme.title: General History Of China (S1)
programme.desc: "Silk Road" refers to the ancient overland commercial trade route that started in ancient China and connected Asia, Africa and Europe.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, salitang magkatugma, salitang naglalarawan, at pagbabaybay, pati na rin ang iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento at ang pag-uugnay ng sarili sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Discover how objects perform motion, and learn about the source of light, sound, heat and electricity, along with their uses.

programme.title: Grade 6 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa wastong paggamit ng pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang may lapi, at iba't ibang uri ng pangungusap. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng lagom, pagsusuri ng pahayag, at kumuha ng impormasyon sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 6 Math
programme.desc: Understand the nature of solid figures, sequences in forming rules, expressions and equations. Learn more about rate and speed, and of area and surface area of plane and solid or space figures.

programme.title: Grade 6 English
programme.desc: Know how to present reports of differing viewpoints and how to evaluate narratives.

programme.title: Grade 6 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano unawain at pahalagahan ang pagpupunyagi ng mga Pilipino tungo sa pagtugon sa mga suliranin, isyu at hamon ng kasarinlan.

programme.title: Grade 6 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about gravity, friction and how they affect movement of objects, alongside how energy is transformed in simple machines.

programme.title: Grade 8 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano magsuri at maghambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, kung ano ang mga estratehiya sa pagkuha ng impormasyon, paano wastong gamitin ang impormal na komunikasyon, at ang angkop na ekspresyon sa pagbabahagi ng ideya o opinyon tungkol sa mga tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 8 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of axiomatic structure of geometry and triangle congruence.

programme.title: Grade 8 English
programme.desc: Examine what are biases, propagandas, parallelism, and cohesive devices in different types of speech.

programme.title: Grade 8 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Aralin ang naging transpormasyon tungo sa makabagong panahon ng mga bansa at rehiyon sa daigdig bunsod ng paglaganap ng mga kaisipan sa agham, politika, at ekonomiya tungo sa pagbuo ng pandaigdigan kamalayan.

programme.title: Grade 8 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about the particle nature of matter as a basis for explaining properties, physical changes, and structure of substances and mixtures. Discover how to identify a substance according to its atomic structure, and how to use the periodic table of elements to organize and determine the chemical properties of elements.

programme.title: Enough
programme.desc: After running away fails, a terrified woman empowers herself in order to battle her abusive husband.

programme.title: Survivor 50 - EP 2
programme.desc: A record 24 castaways return to Fiji for this milestone 50th anniversary season, ranging from multi-season legends to New Era standouts.

programme.title: Talking Point - EP 6
programme.desc: A new wave of drinks promises stress relief, sharper focus and even better gut health. Talking Point investigates what’s really inside these functional beverages and whether they actually work.

programme.title: On The Red Dot - EP 5
programme.desc: Three women with chronic pain search for answers after years of being doubted, misdiagnosed and forced to prove their invisible pain is real.

programme.title: Arts 21 - EP 454
programme.desc: ARTS 21 is an arts magazine show focusing on the latest news and events on the culture scene.

programme.title: Euromaxx - EP 454
programme.desc: Everything you've ever wanted to know about Europe - from traditions and habits to culture shocks and record breakers.

programme.title: Raid The Cage : Season 01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1 - EP 50
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef’s Line?

programme.title: Nico Reynolds: All Fired Up - Series 2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Nico's mouthwatering dishes, his boundless enthusiasm and unrivalled knowledge of the grill are guaranteed to bring some sunshine, whatever the weather! This six-part series is all about giving you the skills, tips and recipes to help you up your grilling game and barbecue like a pro. Nico's here to introduce his signature BBQ recipes and combinations that will keep your guests coming back for more.

programme.title: The Contenders 26 - EP 9
programme.desc: Colombia have high hopes following a two-year unbeaten run, Mohammed Kudus is Ghana's biggest star, and we look at host city Vancouver.

programme.title: Mat Yoyo S3 - EP 5
programme.desc: Mat Yoyo - The New Generation is an educational program in its third season and continues to provide children with wholesome family edu-tainment and fun.

programme.title: Hoppy & Friends - EP 4
programme.desc: Hoppy and Friends is a Pre-school series featuring Hoppy, the Rabbit, Leo the Lion and Panny the Panda. Every episode, they embark on an adventure through stories. Join them on a fantastic journey and explore the wonderful world around them through song, dance.

programme.title: The Big Q S4 - EP 2
programme.desc: The Big Q S4

programme.title: Hobby TV S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: From playing with skateboards to collecting stamps from building models to drawing comics, hosts Randall and Gus show kids the ins n outs of hobbies – the wacky way!

programme.title: Tayo the Little Bus 3 - EP 7
programme.desc: The adventures of Tayo, a blue bus with the number 120. He is very playful and mischievous with his passengers and his friends.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs S2 - EP 21
programme.desc: In this prequel to the 2009 film, inventor boy Flint Lockwood and reporter girl Sam Sparks as best friends during high school!

programme.title: Pokemon Horizons: Season 2 -The Search for Laqua - EP 44
programme.desc: In order to learn and master Terastallization, Liko, Roy, and Dot have joined the Naranja Academy's "Tera Training"! They meet Clavell, the school's director, and Geeta, the chairwoman of Paldea's Pokmon League as well as the Elite Four of Paldea: Rika, Poppy, Larry , and Hassel. And so begins their adventure in Paldea Region, setting their sights on their Terastallization debut!

programme.title: Game On - EP 3
programme.desc: A national gymnast-turned-coach is about to trade his balance beam for a squash racket. With years of honing strength, flexibility, and control, he's used to performing precise routines--- but can he transfer those skills to the fast-paced world of squash?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Go Rush!! - EP 27
programme.desc: Twins Yuhi and Yuamu Ohdo believe there's alien life beyond the stars, even though their attempts to prove it have only ended in failure their hard work and dedication are about to pay off when an extraterrestrial finally arrives on Earth!

programme.title: Dragons: Riders Of Berk S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: The Vikings of Berk must learn to live alongside dragons. Hiccup and his friends establish the Dragon Academy to train dragons and defend the island from new enemies, primarily the Outcast Tribe led by Alvin the Treacherous.

programme.title: Beyblade X S2 - EP 44
programme.desc: Don't miss the continuing adventures as Beyblade pros from around the world gather to compete in the Pro League held inside the X Tower!
